summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KitaTracker bug fixes: User Data Isolation and Auth Keyboard Bug. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified keyboard bug fix and new user empty dashboard.
passed_tests: User Data Isolation: New user registration shows empty dashboard (₱0.00 income, ₱0.00 expenses, 0/0 transactions)
User Data Isolation: Main user (joeljalapitjr@gmail.com) only sees their own data
User Data Isolation: Demo user (demo@finance.com) only sees their own data (empty)
User Data Isolation: Creating income/expense entries attaches correct user_id
User Data Isolation: Users cannot see other users' data (cross-user isolation verified)
Auth form keyboard bug: Can type full email and password without keyboard closing (mobile viewport)
Auth form keyboard bug: Signup form - can type full username, email, password without issues
Login flow: Successful login redirects to dashboard
Signup flow: Successful registration redirects to dashboard with welcome message
Dashboard displays correct totals for authenticated user
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - memo() and useCallback() properly used in LoginPage.js to prevent re-renders
require_auth dependency correctly applied to all CRUD and analytics endpoints
MongoDB queries properly filter by user_id for data isolation
Centralized API utility (api.js) correctly adds Authorization header via interceptor
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests (prefixed with TEST_ or testuser_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Data Isolation bug is FIXED - all CRUD endpoints now require authentication and filter by user_id. Keyboard bug on auth screens is FIXED - memo() and useCallback() prevent re-renders. New users see empty dashboard with 0 values. All protected endpoints return 401 without authentication.

user_data_isolation.new_user_empty_dashboard: PASS - New users see ₱0.00 for all values
user_data_isolation.existing_user_own_data: PASS - Users only see their own income/expenses
user_data_isolation.cross_user_isolation: PASS - No data leakage between users
user_data_isolation.user_id_attachment: PASS - Created entries have correct user_id

auth_keyboard_bug.login_form_typing: PASS - Can type full email and password
auth_keyboard_bug.signup_form_typing: PASS - Can type full username, email, password

authentication.signup_flow: PASS - Creates account and redirects to dashboard
authentication.401_protection: PASS - All protected endpoints return 401 without auth
